# OnlyOffMarkets

> Every off-market real-estate lead in one feed. Public-record signals
> from all 50 states, scored, mapped, and ready to action. Investor-
> focused SaaS with token-based credits, ADU scoring (WA + CA), skip-
> trace lookups, and Lob-backed direct mail.

## Core concepts

- **Underwrite** — score any US address against 14 factors (foreclosure
  stage, equity %, tenure, vacancy, absentee, etc.) and ADU eligibility
  (WA HB 1337 / CA AB 68 + SB 9). Returns 0-100 score, band, breakdown,
  confidence, and a recommendation. Free for any signed-in user.
- **Watchlist** — saved Underwrite snapshots per user. Sortable, with
  notes and direct routes back to Underwrite or to a mailer campaign.
- **Tokens** — $0.20 each. 1 = standard owner lookup, 3 = pro lookup,
  4 = postcard mailer. Volume packs at /tokens.
- **Membership** — Free / Standard ($9.95/mo) / Premium ($29.95/mo).
  Premium adds 5% bonus tokens, 25 free monthly Standard lookups,
  nationwide search (Free is metro-locked), bulk skip-trace, comp gen.
- **Search** — map-driven distress feed. Filter by source (preforeclosure,
  auction, tax-lien, probate, vacant, REO, FSBO, motivated_seller),
  property type, value, beds/baths, sqft, state. Score-ranked.
- **Mailers** — Lob-backed postcard campaigns. Templates editable;
  bulk-send from selected parcels.
- **Alerts** — saved searches that email when new matches land.

## Public REST API

Base URL: https://onlyoffmarkets-api.fly.dev

Auth: `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` (preferred) OR `X-User-Id: <uuid>` (legacy).

- POST /analyzer { address } — full Underwrite (deal score + ADU + ownership)
- GET  /off-market — paginated distress feed; query: source, states, county, property_type, min_value, max_value, min_beds, min_baths, min_sqft, max_sqft, limit
- GET  /off-market/{parcel_key} — single record + raw source log
- GET  /off-market/_/coverage — by_state / by_source / total_parcels
- GET  /off-market/_/pins — lightweight map-marker payload
- GET  /owner/{parcel_key}?tier=standard|pro — skip-trace lookup
- GET  /owner/_/pricing — tier prices
- POST /mailers/campaigns — postcard send (token-debited)
- GET  /tokens/balance — wallet
- POST /billing/checkout/{tokens|membership} — Stripe Checkout
- GET  /billing/membership — current plan
- POST /watchlist — save Underwrite to user's watchlist
- GET  /watchlist — list saved properties
- POST /auth/magic-link { email } — request sign-in email

## Data sources

- BatchData (primary) — property + skip-trace, license permits SaaS resale
- ATTOM Data (cross-validation) — foreclosure / assessor / AVM
- OnlyOffMarkets DB — own scrapers (NYC DOB, Chicago / SF / Philly,
  WA county courts, ATTOM nightly)
- PropertyRadar — code in repo but disabled in production until
  partner OAuth approval (their ToS forbids resale via shared keys)

## Compliance posture

- Public-record data only. No FCRA decisions, no MLS scraping, no
  protected-class filtering.
- Skip-trace tier 1 (Standard) backed by BatchData; tier 2 (Pro) by
  TLOxp via permissible-purpose pathway.
- Mailers honor DNC and Lob's address verification before send.

- /docs/api.md — full OpenAPI spec (coming soon)
- /docs/scoring.md — exact 14-factor formula
- /docs/adu.md — WA HB 1337 + CA AB 68/SB 9 rule citations
